Namespace: Hexalith.Server.Dynamics365Finance.Infrastructure.Controllers
Assembly: Hexalith.Server.Dynamics365Finance.dll
Syntax
[ApiController]
public class Dynamics365FinanceCustomerEventsController : Dynamics365FinanceCustomerBindingController
